title: Apprentice (disambiguation)
content:
'''Apprentice''' can refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Padawan]]''', also known as a '''Jedi apprentice''', was one trained by a [[Jedi Master]], similar to a Sith apprentice.
*'''[[Sith apprentice]]''', one trained by a [[Sith Master]], similar to a Padawan.
*'''[[Sith Apprentice (Rieve)|Sith Apprentice]]''', the name of the standard costume worn by the [[human]] [[Hunter (Grand Arena)|Hunter]] [[Rieve]] during the [[Hunters of the Outer Rim]] competition on the [[planet]] [[Vespaara]].
*'''[[Mandalorian apprentice]]''', one trained by the [[Children of the Watch]], similar to a [[Mandalorian warrior]].

==Legends==
*'''[[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]]''', also known as a '''Jedi apprentice''', was one trained by a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]], similar to a Sith apprentice.
*'''[[Sith apprentice/Legends|Sith apprentice]]''', one trained by a [[Sith Master/Legends|Sith Master]], similar to a Padawan.
*'''[[Galen Marek]]''', also known as '''Darth Vader's Secret Apprentice''', helped form the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].
*'''[[Apprentice (Black Bha'lir)|Apprentice]]''', a rank within the [[Black Bha'lir]].

==Real world==
*'''''[[Star Wars: Jedi Apprentice]]''''', a series of novels written by [[Jude Watson]].
*'''''[[Master & Apprentice]]''''', a novel written by [[Claudia Gray]]
{{Disambig}}
